title: Window sum running total
prompt: Write `MyApp.Shop.running_revenue/0` that selects orders with a running total column (cumulative revenue over time). Use `sum(o.total) |> over(order_by: [asc: o.placed_at])` as the running sum window. Select `{o.id, o.placed_at, o.total, running_total}`. Write to `lib/my_app/shop.ex`.
tier_rationale: Running aggregates via window sum — different from group_by sum. Requires knowing both APIs.
